education.institution: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology, Bhubaneswar, OD

projects.name: Covid19 Detection from Xray image
projects.description: Developed a COVID-19 detection model using deep learning and CNNs on X-ray images for early diagnosis, supporting healthcare professionals in pandemic management.

projects.name: AI-Enabled FinTech B2B Invoice Management Application
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered FinTech B2B invoice app, streamlining CRUD operations. Enhanced efficiency and transparency by automating invoice handling, reducing manual effort for businesses.
